en.extract:
The slender-billed oriole (Oriolus tenuirostris) is a species of bird in the family Oriolidae found from the eastern Himalayas to Southeast Asia.
Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.


Taxonomy and systematics


Subspecies
Two subspecies are recognized: 

O. t. invisus - Riley, 1940: Found in southern Vietnam
O. t. tenuirostris - Blyth, 1846: Found from the eastern Himalayas to southern China and central Vietnam


References

The '''slender-billed oriole''' ('''''Oriolus tenuirostris''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Oriolidae]] found from the eastern Himalayas to Southeast Asia.

Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.{{citation needed|date=July 2022}}

==Taxonomy and systematics==
===Subspecies===
Two [[subspecies]] are recognized:<ref>{{Cite journal|title=IOC World Bird List 7.1|url=http://www.worldbirdnames.org/ioc-lists/crossref|journal=IOC World Bird List Datasets|doi=10.14344/ioc.ml.7.1|doi-access=free}}</ref> 
* ''O. t. invisus'' - <small>[[Joseph Harvey Riley|Riley]], 1940</small>: Found in southern Vietnam
* ''O. t. tenuirostris'' - <small>[[Edward Blyth|Blyth]], 1846</small>: Found from the eastern Himalayas to southern China and central Vietnam

zh.extract:
细嘴黄鹂（学名：Oriolus tenuirostris），是雀形目黄鹂科的一种鸟类。


特征
细嘴黄鹂体重约81.38克，翼长约146.1毫米，嘴峰长约34.8毫米，喙宽度约9毫米，喙厚度约8.9毫米，跗蹠长约24.9毫米，尾长约85.5毫米。细嘴黄鹂在其分布区内为留鸟，其栖息在半开放的高大树木组成的森林中，食性为草食性。


亚种
O. t. tenuirostris：分布于喜马拉雅山脉东部至中国西南部和东南亚北部地区。
O. t. invisus：分布于南越。
